settings.title: Personalisation Guide
settings.description: We are honoured to add personal touches to so many of our handcrafted pieces - custom engravings, an additional stone or a custom band profile. Here we share the ways you can make your piece your own through our online services, or how to go your own way and contact our team.
settings.feature_text: Handcrafting each piece to order allows us to add personal touches, imbuing each piece with a deep level of sentimentality and purpose.

settings.title: Birthstones
settings.description:
The addition of birthstones allows us to connect with our clients personally, playing a significant role in why we do what we do. Handcrafting each piece to order allows us to add such custom touches, imbuing each piece with a deep level of sentimentality and purpose.

The concept of birthstones has a rich history that can be traced back to ancient civilizations. Over time, different cultures and traditions adopted the concept of birthstones, associating specific gemstones with each month based on astrological, mystical, or symbolic properties.

Each stone has the power to carry personal significance, represent a meaningful connection or loved one, and celebrate your individual story and life's precious moments. When exploring our birthstone options online, hover or click each individual stone for an in-depth guide on colour, symbolism, and their unique folklore over time.

settings.title: Hidden Birthstones
settings.description:
We are honoured to add personal touches to so many of our handcrafted pieces and of all the
ways to make a piece extra personal, there is nothing quite as special as the addition of a hidden stone. These secret details tell a story unique to the wearer, they’re held dear and kept close.

Hidden stones can become a poetic expression of sentiment – a nod to tradition, a symbol of family, a mark of a place or a moment in time. The value of these subtle additions is that they're sacred, personal, and meaningful - something that is just for you.

settings.title: Accent Birthstones
settings.description: Wear your heart on your sleeve with our accent birthstones. By featuring your birthstone of choice outwardly, it serves as a constant reminder of what you hold most dear; a wearable symbol of individuality, a celebration, memory, an ode to a loved one or a marker of time. Whether it represents your personal story or that of a loved one, an accent birthstone will become your own unique talisman, a treasured heirloom for generations to come.

settings.title: Birthstone Promotion T&Cs
settings.description:
From 12th - 31st July, receive a complimentary birthstone on all eligible products. This offer applies to products within our online personalisation service only, either hidden or accent birthstone placement.

Up to 2 complimentary birthstones can be redeemed per order, use code BIRTHSTONE at checkout to redeem. Offer is valid from 12.07.23 – 31.07.23. Cannot be used in conjunction with any other offer, and only valid for our birthstone collection. Available both online and in-store.

settings.title: Birthstone Collection
settings.description: Birthstones have the power to carry personal significance, represent a meaningful connection or loved one, celebrate your individual story, or honour life's precious moments. Be inspired and discover our in-depth guide on colour, symbolism, and each stones unique folklore over time

settings.title: Engraving
settings.description: Allow us to engrave your piece with a special date – such as the day you met, or your wedding anniversary – a nickname or secret love note. Becoming a hidden treasure known only to the wearer, your personalised engraving will serve as a private reminder of a special moment, a heartfelt declaration, or a shared secret. With our online service offering font options and varied character lengths, our engraver will carve your message by hand, using traditional techniques and processes. It is always an honour to capture the essence of a relationship, with your hand-engraved words becoming an everlasting symbol of love, commitment, or a personal mantra - carrying sentimental value that transcends time.

settings.title: Engravable Collection
settings.description: Becoming a hidden treasure known only to the wearer, your personalised engraving will serve as a reminder of a special moment, a heartfelt declaration, or a shared secret.

settings.title: Go Your Own Way
settings.description:
Imbue your ring with milestone markers through our custom personalisation services. Explore your creativity and discuss with our team ways to symbolically tell your story – have your handwriting become the font for your engraved message, mark your finger print or that of a loved one, design a family crest, illustrate symbols of meaning or initials, the options are limitless.

Let our skilled team of design consultants bring
your perfect piece to life today.
